content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

The proposed amendment is incorrect and should not be accepted; it mischaracterizes a revision as metadata-only when the cited changes include functional runtime and test updates relevant to review enablement.

## Votes

- `fr-3-f1de1ac3`: Reject
  The claim that only `.ralph-burning/projects/kvc/journal.ndjson` and `run.json` were changed is not technically supported. The revision includes non-metadata updates in `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs` (and related watcher/runtime test paths) that wire `--enable-review` into quick request handling and add coverage for default and opt-in review behavior, so acceptance criteria are addressed at the implementation level.
